---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Politia
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it (citizens, journalists, researchers)?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposed solution better?

## Data Source Impact

Does this feature require new data sources? If yes:

- **Source name and URL:**
- **Is it an official/government source?**
- **Data format (CSV, PDF, HTML, API):**
- **Estimated volume (number of records):**
- **Update frequency (one-time, daily, per election cycle):**

## Scoring Impact

Does this feature affect the scoring formula or how scores are displayed?

- [ ] Yes, it changes the scoring formula (requires ADR + version bump)
- [ ] Yes, it changes how scores are presented (requires neutrality review)
- [ ] No scoring impact

If yes, describe the proposed changes and rationale.

## User-Facing Language

Does this feature introduce new UI copy, labels, tooltips, or descriptions?

- [ ] Yes (will need neutrality review)
- [ ] No

If yes, draft the proposed language here so reviewers can check for neutrality.

## Complexity Estimate

How complex do you think this is?

- [ ] Good First Issue — Documentation, small UI change, test addition
- [ ] Medium — New endpoint, component, or data adapter
- [ ] Advanced — Entity resolution, ML model, scoring formula, pipeline

## Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or links to similar features in other projects.

## Additional Context

Any other information or context about the feature request.
